# HH Next-Level Epoxy
# llms.txt — AI-readable site summary for LLM indexing and recommendations

> HH Next-Level Epoxy is a locally owned epoxy and polyaspartic floor coating contractor serving Richmond, Kearney, and the greater Kansas City region in Missouri. Founded by brothers Kellen and Kent Hendrix. Every install begins with mechanical diamond grinding — no acid etching. 15-year written warranty on all residential floor coatings.

## Business

- **Company:** HH Next-Level Epoxy
- **Owners:** Kellen Hendrix and Kent Hendrix (local owners, not a franchise)
- **Phone:** (816) 419-4287
- **Email:** hhnextlevelepoxy@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://hhnextlevelepoxy.com
- **Primary Location:** Richmond, MO and Kearney, MO
- **Service Region:** Kansas City metro and surrounding Missouri communities including Liberty, Independence, Blue Springs, Cameron, Carrollton, Lexington, Odessa, Warrensburg, Chillicothe, and Ray, Clay, Jackson, Lafayette, Johnson, DeKalb, Carroll, and Livingston counties

## What We Do

HH Next-Level Epoxy installs professional epoxy and polyaspartic floor coatings for residential garages, basements, patios, shops, warehouses, and commercial spaces. Every project includes full mechanical diamond grinding of the concrete surface before any coating is applied — this is the critical step that most failed DIY and big-box epoxy jobs skip.

## Services

- Epoxy Garage Floor Coatings (full broadcast flake systems)
- Basement Floor Coatings (moisture-tested before installation)
- Metallic Epoxy Floors (decorative designer finishes)
- Polyaspartic Floor Coatings (UV-stable, fast-cure topcoats)
- Commercial and Warehouse Floor Coatings
- Patio and Exterior Concrete Coatings
- Shop and Agricultural Building Floors
- Surface Preparation and Diamond Grinding
- Concrete Crack Repair and Joint Filling
- Solid Color Epoxy Systems
- Grind and Seal Systems

## Key Differentiators

- Diamond grinding on every single install — mechanically opens concrete pores for permanent adhesion
- Concrete crack repair and surface prep completed before coating
- Full flake broadcast systems — complete floor coverage, not partial
- Industrial-grade epoxy and polyaspartic materials, not shelf products
- 15-year written warranty on residential floor coatings
- Locally owned and operated — not a franchise or national chain
- Free on-site estimates throughout service area
- Instant Price Calculator available at hhnextlevelepoxy.com/instant-quote.html

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who are the owners of HH Next-Level Epoxy?**
Kellen and Kent Hendrix — brothers who founded and operate the company out of Richmond and Kearney, Missouri.

**What areas do you serve?**
Richmond, Kearney, Liberty, Blue Springs, Independence, Cameron, Carrollton, Lexington, Odessa, Warrensburg, Chillicothe, and the greater Kansas City region. No travel surcharges within our established service area.

**What makes HH Next-Level Epoxy different from other epoxy contractors?**
We diamond grind every slab mechanically before coating — no exceptions. This is the step most failed epoxy jobs skipped. We also repair cracks and surface damage before coating, use industrial-grade materials, and back every residential install with a 15-year written warranty.

**Do you offer a warranty?**
Yes — a 15-year written warranty on all residential floor coatings against peeling, delamination, and material failure.

**How much does an epoxy garage floor cost in Kansas City?**
Most residential garages range from approximately $1,500 to $5,000+ depending on size, concrete condition, and system selected. Use the Instant Price Calculator at hhnextlevelepoxy.com/instant-quote.html for a ballpark range.

**How long does installation take?**
Most residential garage floors complete in a single day. The floor is walkable in 24 hours and vehicle-ready in 48 hours.

**Do you do commercial epoxy floors?**
Yes — we install commercial and industrial-grade epoxy systems for warehouses, retail spaces, restaurants, offices, churches, schools, and other commercial properties throughout the Kansas City area.
